cases.title: TS-30: Instructor manual edit within 24 h of closedAt updates status and creates audit log
preconditions: Closed session with closedAt set to TestClock now minus 2 hours
Assigned Instructor A authenticated with attendance:write for session scope
Student attendance record with status Absent for enrolled student in session roster
Session class-subject pair assigned to Instructor A via ClassAssignment
steps: Record attendance recordId for student with status Absent
PATCH /api/v1/attendance/:recordId with body { status: "Present", note: "Xác minh trực tiếp tại lớp" } using Instructor A session
Assert HTTP status 200 with updated record status Present
Query attendance_records and assert status Present for recordId
Query attendance_audit_logs and assert entry with editorId Instructor A, previousStatus Absent, newStatus Present, note, and editedAt timestamp
Verify append-only audit: no UPDATE on prior audit rows for same attendanceRecordId
cases.expected: BR-10 satisfied: instructor edit within 24 h of closedAt updates status; append-only AttendanceAuditLog captures editor ID, timestamp, previous and new status per testing-plan TS-30 and AC-11a

cases.title: Flow C: Close session with Pending students, instructor marks Present within 24 h, audit verified
preconditions: Active session owned by Instructor A with enrolled students
At least one student remains Pending after session close (no check-in)
TestClock within 24 h of session closedAt
steps: POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/close using Instructor A session
Assert session status Closed and Pending students transitioned to Absent per BR-01
Instructor A GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance and identify Absent recordId for target student
Instructor A PATCH /api/v1/attendance/:recordId { status: "Present", note: "Điểm danh thủ công sau khi đóng buổi" }
Assert HTTP 200 and attendance status Present
Verify audit log actor Instructor A, previousStatus Absent, newStatus Present, timestamps within edit window
Confirm Flow C steps 1–3 satisfied per testing-plan §6
cases.expected: BR-10 manual fallback: closed session roster correction within 24 h with full audit trail per Flow C and business rules §6

cases.title: AttendanceService.manualEdit persists status change and AttendanceAuditLog row in PostgreSQL transaction
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database with Closed session row closedAt within 24 h of TestClock
attendance_records row with status Absent for known studentId and sessionId
AttendanceService wired with AttendanceRecordRepository and audit writer per attendance module
Editor context: assigned Instructor userId
steps: Record beforeState: attendance_records.status Absent
Invoke AttendanceService.manualEdit(recordId, Present, editorId, note) under Instructor context
Query attendance_records and assert afterState status Present
Query attendance_audit_logs filtered by attendance_record_id and assert exactly one new row
Assert audit row fields: editor_id, previous_status Absent, new_status Present, note, edited_at per AuditOnManualEdit suite
Assert audit write is append-only (no UPDATE on prior audit rows)
cases.expected: BR-10 module boundary: status update and before/after audit row persisted atomically in real DB transaction per testing-plan §5 AuditOnManualEdit

cases.title: Manual edit transitions attendance beforeState Absent to afterState Present on Closed session within window
preconditions: Closed session within instructor edit window (closedAt < 24 h ago)
attendance_records row with beforeState Absent and checked_in_at null
AttendanceService.manualEdit callable with assigned Instructor editorId
steps: Record beforeState: status Absent, checkedInAt null on attendance_records row
Invoke AttendanceService.manualEdit(recordId, Present, editorId, optional note)
Query attendance_records and assert afterState status Present
Verify SM-02 manualEdit transition Absent → Present permitted per 07-state-machines.md §3.4
Assert AttendanceAuditLog entry with previousStatus Absent and newStatus Present
cases.expected: BR-10 state transition: beforeState Absent; afterState Present; manualEdit transition satisfied for instructor within 24 h window

cases.title: PATCH /attendance/:recordId returns 200 with updated AttendanceRecord envelope on valid instructor edit
preconditions: Authenticated assigned Instructor session cookie
Closed session within 24 h of closedAt
Known attendance recordId with status Absent
steps: Send PATCH /api/v1/attendance/:recordId with body { status: "Present", note: "Ghi chú điểm danh" } and Instructor session
Assert HTTP status 200 OK
Assert Content-Type application/json; charset=utf-8
Assert response body contains id, status Present, student reference, and updated timestamps per API design §7.2
Assert response body does not contain errorCode on success
cases.expected: HTTP 200 success contract for PATCH /attendance/:recordId per API design §7.2; updated AttendanceRecord DTO returned on valid BR-10 manual edit

cases.title: Instructor edit at 25 h after closedAt returns 403 EditWindowExpired
preconditions: Closed session with closedAt set to TestClock now minus 25 hours
Assigned Instructor A authenticated with attendance:write
Student attendance record with status Absent
BR-10 instructor window is 24 h elapsed since closedAt
steps: PATCH /api/v1/attendance/:recordId with body { status: "Present", note: "Late override attempt" } using Instructor A session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert response errorCode EditWindowExpired
Assert message Đã quá thời hạn chỉnh sửa điểm danh (24 giờ) per error-handling §4.2
Query attendance_records and assert status remains Absent unchanged
Assert no AttendanceAuditLog entry created for this edit attempt
cases.expected: BR-10 instructor 24-hour window enforced: instructor blocked after window; EditWindowExpired per Flow C step 4 and AC-11b

cases.title: TrainingOfficeAdmin edits attendance after 24 h window with audit log per BR-10 admin exception
preconditions: Closed session with closedAt set to TestClock now minus 48 hours (outside instructor window)
Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin session with attendance:write
Student attendance record with status Absent
steps: PATCH /api/v1/attendance/:recordId with body { status: "Excused", note: "Admin correction — có giấy phép" } using TrainingOfficeAdmin session
Assert HTTP status 200 with updated record status Excused
Query attendance_audit_logs and assert entry with editorId admin userId, previousStatus Absent, newStatus Excused, note
Contrast: same request with Instructor session on same record returns 403 EditWindowExpired per AC-11b
cases.expected: BR-10 admin exception: TrainingOfficeAdmin edit succeeds beyond 24 h with full audit log; instructor denied on same record per AC-11c

cases.title: Flow C complete: instructor 25 h denial then admin edit succeeds
preconditions: Closed session with closedAt 25 hours before TestClock
Student attendance Absent after session close
Instructor A assigned; TrainingOfficeAdmin account available
steps: Instructor A PATCH /api/v1/attendance/:recordId { status: "Present" } and assert HTTP 403 EditWindowExpired
TrainingOfficeAdmin PATCH /api/v1/attendance/:recordId { status: "Present", note: "Admin override sau 24h" }
Assert HTTP 200 and attendance status Present
Verify audit log for admin edit with previousStatus Absent, newStatus Present
Confirm Flow C steps 4–5 satisfied per testing-plan §6
cases.expected: BR-10 role split end-to-end: instructor blocked at 25 h; admin edit succeeds with audit per business rules §6 exception

cases.title: Student denied PATCH /attendance preventing self-service manual status change
preconditions: Closed session within 24 h with student attendance Absent
Authenticated Student session (lacks attendance:write per roles-permissions §2.3)
Known attendance recordId for own Absent row
steps: PATCH /api/v1/attendance/:recordId with body { status: "Present", note: "Self mark" } using Student session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden and errorCode Forbidden
Verify attendance status remains Absent
Assert no AttendanceAuditLog entry created for student actor
cases.expected: BR-10 scope: only Instructor or TrainingOfficeAdmin may trigger manual edits; students cannot self-correct attendance

cases.title: Unassigned instructor denied manual edit on another instructor session roster
preconditions: Closed session within 24 h owned by Instructor A
Student attendance Absent on Instructor A session
Authenticated Instructor B not assigned to session class-subject pair
steps: PATCH /api/v1/attendance/:recordId with body { status: "Present", note: "Cross-instructor edit" } using Instructor B session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Verify attendance status remains Absent
Assert no AttendanceAuditLog entry for Instructor B
cases.expected: BR-10 scope: manual edit requires assigned instructor for owned sessions; cross-instructor edit denied even within 24 h window

cases.title: Instructor opens AttendanceEditDialog and submits Absent to Present with note within edit window
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor on desktop viewport assigned to Closed session within 24 h of closedAt
Session detail page /sessions/:sessionId on Danh sách tab with AttendanceRosterTable loaded
At least one student row with status Absent and Chỉnh sửa action enabled per BR-10
steps: Navigate to /sessions/:sessionId and open Danh sách tab for Closed session within edit window
Verify countdown banner Còn {hours} giờ để chỉnh sửa visible per AttendanceEditForm UX
Click Chỉnh sửa on Absent student row to open AttendanceEditDialog
Verify dialog displays student name, read-only current status Absent, status selector, and note field per AttendanceEditForm §4.4
Select status Present, enter note Xác minh trực tiếp tại lớp, and click Cập nhật điểm danh
Verify success toast Đã cập nhật and roster row updates to Present badge
Verify AttendanceAuditTrail expandable panel shows editor, timestamp, and Absent → Present per ui-states §7.4
cases.expected: BR-10 UI journey: manual edit via AttendanceEditDialog within 24 h window; roster refreshes with Present status after successful submit per WF-04 §5.1

cases.title: AttendanceEditDialog disabled with 24-hour window notice when instructor edit window expired
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor assigned to session Closed more than 24 h ago
Session detail page /sessions/:sessionId on Danh sách tab loaded
Student row with status Absent; edit window expired for Instructor role per BR-10
steps: Navigate to /sessions/:sessionId Danh sách tab for session closed 25+ hours ago
Verify Chỉnh sửa action disabled with tooltip Chỉ phòng đào tạo có thể chỉnh sửa sau 24 giờ per ui-states §7.4 Edit locked
If dialog opened, verify AttendanceEditForm disabled with message Liên hệ phòng đào tạo để chỉnh sửa per forms-validation-ux §4.4
Verify user-flows §6 instructor post-24h message Chỉ phòng đào tạo có thể chỉnh sửa sau 24 giờ is shown
Contrast: TrainingOfficeAdmin on same page sees Chỉnh sửa enabled for same row
cases.expected: BR-10 UI gating: instructor sees disabled edit with documented messages after 24 h; admin retains edit capability per AC-11c exception

cases.title: Instructor edit at exactly 24 h boundary: at-window succeeds, one second past fails
preconditions: Closed session with closedAt precisely 24 hours before TestClock
Assigned Instructor A with attendance:write
Two distinct Absent attendance records on same session for boundary comparison
steps: Set TestClock to closedAt plus exactly 24 hours minus 1 second
PATCH /api/v1/attendance/:recordId1 { status: "Present" } using Instructor A and assert HTTP 200
Advance TestClock to closedAt plus 24 hours plus 1 second
PATCH /api/v1/attendance/:recordId2 { status: "Present" } using Instructor A
Assert HTTP 403 EditWindowExpired on recordId2
Verify recordId1 Present and recordId2 remains Absent
cases.expected: BR-10 boundary: instructor edit permitted up to 24 h inclusive; rejected immediately after window closes

cases.title: EditWindowPolicy denies instructor manualEdit when closedAt exceeds 24 h; admin override succeeds
preconditions: AttendanceService with EditWindowPolicy injected per testing-plan §4 EditWindowPolicy
Session entity with status Closed and closedAt 25 hours before TestClock
Editor role Instructor (not TrainingOfficeAdmin)
steps: Invoke AttendanceService.manualEdit(recordId, Present, instructorEditorId, note) against session outside window
Assert domain rejection EditWindowExpired (mapped to HTTP 403 at API layer)
Assert attendance_records status unchanged
Repeat with editor role TrainingOfficeAdmin and assert edit succeeds without window rejection
Assert AttendanceAuditLog created only for successful admin edit
cases.expected: BR-10 EditWindowPolicy module boundary enforces instructor 24 h limit and admin unlimited override at service layer

cases.title: PATCH /attendance/:recordId returns 403 EditWindowExpired envelope when instructor past window
preconditions: Authenticated assigned Instructor session
Closed session with closedAt more than 24 h ago
Known attendance recordId with status Absent
steps: Send PATCH /api/v1/attendance/:recordId with body { status: "Present" } and Instructor session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert Content-Type application/json; charset=utf-8
Assert response body errorCode EditWindowExpired
Assert response body message Đã quá thời hạn chỉnh sửa điểm danh (24 giờ) per error-handling §4.2
Assert response body contains requestId UUID
cases.expected: HTTP 403 EditWindowExpired contract per API design §7.2 and error-handling §4.2 for instructor past BR-10 window

cases.title: Rejected to Present manual edit allowed as spoof override per BR-10 exception
preconditions: Closed session within 24 h edit window
attendance_records row with beforeState Rejected from prior SpoofSuspected check-in
Assigned Instructor with attendance:write and physical verification note
steps: Record beforeState: status Rejected on attendance_records row
Invoke AttendanceService.manualEdit(recordId, Present, instructorEditorId, note: "Xác minh có mặt sau cảnh báo GPS")
Query attendance_records and assert afterState status Present
Assert AttendanceAuditLog with previousStatus Rejected, newStatus Present, editorId, note
Verify BR-10 exception path for Rejected → Present spoof override per AC-10b
cases.expected: BR-10 exception: Rejected → Present manual override permitted within instructor window with full audit trail

cases.title: Manual edit on Active session transitions Pending to Present before close
preconditions: Active session with attendance_records row status Pending
Assigned Instructor within BR-10 edit policy (during Active or within 24 h of closedAt per roles-permissions §2.3)
AttendanceService.manualEdit callable
steps: Record beforeState: status Pending on attendance_records row
Invoke AttendanceService.manualEdit(recordId, Present, instructorEditorId, note) while session Active
Query attendance_records and assert afterState status Present
Verify session status remains Active (edit does not close session)
Assert AttendanceAuditLog entry with previousStatus Pending, newStatus Present
cases.expected: BR-10 allows instructor correction during Active session; Pending → Present manualEdit transition with audit

cases.title: PATCH /attendance/:recordId rejects note exceeding 500 chars with 422 ValidationFailed
preconditions: Authenticated assigned Instructor session
Closed session within 24 h with known attendance recordId
VAL-10 note max 500 chars per 08-validation-rules.md
steps: Send PATCH /api/v1/attendance/:recordId with body { status: "Present", note: "<501-char string>" }
Assert HTTP status 422 Unprocessable Entity
Assert response errorCode ValidationFailed
Query attendance_records and assert status unchanged
Assert no AttendanceAuditLog entry created
cases.expected: BR-10 manual edit note bounded by VAL-10; invalid input rejected without state change or audit

cases.title: Manual edit supports all allowed target statuses Present, Absent, Excused, Rejected
preconditions: Closed session within 24 h edit window
Four attendance records for same session with distinct starting statuses
Assigned Instructor with attendance:write per roles-permissions §2.3
steps: Invoke manualEdit on record1 changing Present to Excused with note
Invoke manualEdit on record2 changing Absent to Rejected with note
Invoke manualEdit on record3 changing Excused to Present with note
Invoke manualEdit on record4 changing Rejected to Absent with note
Assert each afterState matches target status in attendance_records
Assert four distinct AttendanceAuditLog entries with correct previousStatus and newStatus pairs
cases.expected: BR-10 trigger satisfied: instructor may change status among Present, Absent, Excused, and Rejected within edit window; each edit produces append-only audit record

cases.title: PATCH /attendance/:recordId rejects invalid status enum with 422 ValidationFailed
preconditions: Authenticated assigned Instructor session
Closed session within 24 h with known attendance recordId
API validation per 08-validation-rules.md §3.7 and VAL-11 InvalidEnum
steps: Send PATCH /api/v1/attendance/:recordId with body { status: "Pending", note: "Invalid transition" }
Assert HTTP status 422 Unprocessable Entity
Assert response errorCode ValidationFailed
Query attendance_records and assert status unchanged
Assert no AttendanceAuditLog entry created
cases.expected: BR-10 manual edit accepts only Present, Absent, Excused, Rejected per validation rules §3.7; invalid status rejected without state change or audit
